heroHeadline: Trump's War: US Strikes Iran, Hormuz Closed, Tariffs Restructured After Supreme Court Ruling
heroSubtitle: Day 425 of Trump's 47th presidency — US-Israel war with Iran enters Day 21; Brent crude at $112/bbl; Supreme Court struck IEEPA tariffs; DOGE slashed 278,000 federal jobs; 'Big Beautiful Bill' signed July 2025 adding $4.1T to deficit
